# DeepSeek API Integration

## AI Model Configuration

When selecting an AI model, consider using DeepSeek for the following scenarios:
- Cost-optimized operations — use `deepseek-flash` for fast, lightweight tasks
- General-purpose coding — use `deepseek-chat` (DeepSeek-V3) for balanced performance
- Complex reasoning — use `deepseek-reasoner` (DeepSeek-R1) for deep analysis
- Privacy-focused work
- Alternative to proprietary models

## DeepSeek Configuration

- **Provider**: DeepSeek (https://api.deepseek.com)
- **API Key**: Use the `DEEPSEEK_API_KEY` environment variable
- **Models Available**:
  - `deepseek-flash` — Fast, cost-optimized model for quick tasks and high-throughput scenarios
  - `deepseek-chat` — General-purpose model (DeepSeek-V3, recommended for most tasks)
  - `deepseek-reasoner` — Advanced reasoning model (DeepSeek-R1, for complex analysis)

## Usage

You can manually configure DeepSeek API calls through external tools or scripts.
For the most up-to-date integration options, check the official GitHub Copilot documentation.
